server.name: msdocs-mcp-server
server.title: Microsoft Learn MCP server
server.description: The Microsoft Learn MCP server is a remote Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables Copilots and AI agents to securely access trusted, up-to-date knowledge from Microsoft’s official documentation via streamable HTTP—allowing them to search content, retrieve complete articles, and surface relevant code samples to deliver accurate, grounded responses.

x-ms-use-cases.name: Search Functionality
x-ms-use-cases.description: Search and fetch official Microsoft documentation and code samples.
